problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: If Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
